reviews.review_description: Just got the game, and already I am experiencing the bugs. The very first quest that is supposed to appear on the quest board after creating my character is missing, despite me reloading it, deleting it, and building another character. Have yet to find a solution to this problem, and I'm disappointed with this, though justifiably so, despite that I have yet to see anyone experiencing a similar bug

developer_response.body: Sorry about that, I just recently pushed a major update and inadvertently broke a bunch of stuff. I just released a new patch to fix it, would be great if you could try again! Sorry for the inconvenience.

reviews.review_description:
This game is charming and very fun, if you can tolerate and/or navigate beyond the many bugs. Some examples of what I'm talking about:
- I bought a "Mr. Smile" (mask). The game was confused about whether or not I could equip it at the same time as my backpack; sometimes yes, sometimes no.
- After logging back in, the Mr. Smile was placed in front of my face, meaning that I could not see anything I was doing - including not being able to see my inventory to unequip it.
- I had a quest to collect 15 slime jellies. The person I collected them for didn't care. I dropped them in the quest box, nothing happened. No way to complete it, I guess.
- I brought along an archer companion from the guild. She is fond of standing directly on top of me, so that her avatar overlaps with mine and I see bits of her face floating through my vision.

developer_response.body: Just fixed those issues you mentioned, thanks for helping out and hope you enjoy the game!

reviews.review_title: really good game but very confusing
reviews.review_description: The game is great I do love it It gives me old school JRPG vibes and I'm pretty sure that's what it's going for but I've come across a bit of an issue I have a quest where I have to get 15 pieces of iron from Verdant Hills and unfortunately I have no idea where that is I can't click on my map and highlight a spot and figure out where it is which I understand is probably the appeal for the exploration but for quest to tell me to go somewhere and not give me an inkling of an idea where to go and how to get there is kind of mind-boggling and health bars for the enemy or even a level of the enemy would be tremendously helpful cuz I don't know how close an enemy is to dying I can just tell how close I am to dying It is frustrating and confusing but otherwise like I said really good game that and the customization has a bit of an issue where it doesn't like to stay customized so you know likes to flicker in and out like I've changed my eye color to green it does not want to stay green half the time he wants to default back to brown and brown but again like I said really good game I really like it but please have some mercy and prove at least some of those

The only thing I have to complain about is the customization glitch!! Whenever you change ANYTHING about your character's appearance it reverts back to brown hair and blue eyes. I have black hair and brown eyes and tan skin 😬

So I really really love this game i enjoyed everything about it up until I completed the goblin mission in the first town and was supposed to go talk to the mayor, first the mayor never acknowledged that I was supposed to talk to him though maybe I did something wrong so I made a new character and got back to the same problem thinking it was the game I uninstalled and re-download the game still couldn't advance. Sad this was the case I requested a refund which I was surprised went through because I played more then two hours I requested store credit but never received it after a week of not getting the refund I said oh well I really like the game ill just grind lvls till I find a fix and re-downloaded the game but now I cant even equip my bow!!! Ive looked everywhere for a solution and I dont care about them money ill buy the game again full price if I have too but someone plz help!! Outside of that this game is definitely a 5 start game and if I can get back to playing ill be more then happy to edit my review to reflect that!

developer_response.body:
Hey, if you let me know your username I can look into what happened to your character. If you're on discord feel free to join the server and shoot me a message, or you can contact me at astor@questtogethervr.com

The mayor in Orvelte has no new dialogue after completing the goblin quest, but you are supposed to talk to the mayor after completing the wyvern eggs quest. Maybe that's what you're thinking of? 

And about the bow: job classes were added to the game a little while ago, maybe you first played before the update and now you're trying to use a Bow without being an Archer yet. You can pick a job class at the guild HQ in Eltstadt if you're over level 5, just pick Archer and you'll be able to use a bow again and learn archer skills.

reviews.review_description: Ok so I will get right into it. It was fun got past the tutorial quests but please make it real time battles not turn based. It ruins the immersion for me sadly I'm not impressed.

*UPDATE*
Fixes much appreciated. I can now play and remain in the game without constant reboots. That alone has made the game MUCH more enjoyable. This is really a fun game, and I've upgraded my rating to well deserved 3/5 stars. It's still really glitchy at times with buildings partially loading, weapons not equipping correctly, and not being able to spawn purchased furniture in the room at the inn.  But, even with these issues, I can't deny it's still really fun and moving in that right direction. Looking forward to giving this 5 stars once these issues are fixed.

*Last Review* 

Glitchy, Spontaneous Forced Headset Reboots, System UI Errors, Continuous Failed Loading screens, Game not showing items purchased using ($5000 zin), and Disappearing & half loaded town buildings. 

Honestly, Quest Together is riddled with game breaking issues, BUT even still, there's still something special about it. I love how easy it is to play co-op, that's one thing the game definitely gets right. I also enjoy the open feel of the game. It really feels like you can go anywhere. However, there's a failed loading screen that gray screens my headset, and forces me to restart the game from the Meta screen at every new area. Very frustrating. ALL of these issues make Quest Together very unenjoyable to play.

We worked really hard to level up, even with constant failed loading screens, system reboot, and health potions being subtracted as used, but not receiving any additional health points. Through countless other constant glitches, we managed to defeat the monster in the cave quest and received 10,000 zin. Tried to use it to buy furniture, however, that furniture never appeared in inventory, or spawned at the Orvelte Inn. Very, very disappointing. 

Sadly as is, there are too many glitches and problems to merit playing this game. Though I'm feeling a bit jaded about spending $20 for a glitchy game, I'm hopeful that the developers will fix these issues. This game has lots of potential, but as is, it's not worth $20, and earns a generous 2 out of 5 stars. I can't wait for the updates, will gladly update when the game is fixed.

reviews.review_title: Works fine minus a game breaking bug
reviews.review_description:
I cant grab the sword from my holster. I've tried everywhere. I unequipped, reequipped, tried both hands on every part of my body to see if ANYWHERE worked. It worked once randomly and then never again. I was stuck just taking damage over and over because I cant grab my sword. If im supposed to go phantom ghost mode and shove my hand through my own physical body, I cant really play this game. 
Im not even built weird. I tried standing and sitting. Don't know how to fix.

developer_response.body: you either unequipped the sword or you're reaching way too far back behind your shoulder. the trigger box is huge, just hold your hand above your shoulder and grab.

reviews.review_title: Looking for a turn based jrpg?
reviews.review_description:
Simple , light hearted lengthy. Just a couple key words when thinking about quest together. Been playing it with my wife and three kids. 
There are bugs to work through from time to time that might require a game reboot. That being said it's pros outweigh the bugs by far.
Breathe of fresh Hyrule air 😆

The general concept in game is nice. But when you finally get enough to choose a class, you just… can’t choose it. Even if you get a different class, you won’t be able to get the equipment for it, so you’d better get used to be stuck as swordsman for a long time.

developer_response.body: You can buy class-specific gear in Eltstadt from a vendor near the fountain. Also if you're playing a class like Priest or Mage, you might want to get some party members to help tank hits from enemies. (either real players or NPC party members)

reviews.review_description: Cool game cool concept but its very buggy only get if your ok with bugs also not many players

Very fun for turn based combat and they have pvp
also have a great community of players and if you buy a stall you get a goblin that sells your stuff.

Most people say it’s too laggy I’ve never had any lag / bugs the only major problem is that it’s nearly impossible to find any players and most players you meet are severely under level and most the time don’t even have a class / job so there is no point finding others when you can just hire npcs for cheap other then that it’s a very solid game.
Its alright got potential
Can't wait for more updates
I picked this up on sale, and I'm not disappointed. My experience has been enjoyable so far. As an mmorpg, it lacks a player base, but I'm fine playing as a solo adventure.
Good game can there be more hits before the timer runs out and restores not enjoying the one hit wait for it to refill thing also is the invite and join function not working ??

reviews.review_title: Great game with lots of potential but...
reviews.review_description:
This game has so much potential.  Love the aspect of adventure and battles with a storyline.  One of the best Meta games I've played.  However, the bugs are killing me.  I know this is basically a new game and I'm hoping with all my being that they can clean up the annoying bugs in this app.

 If that's done I can guarantee this game would skyrocket to the top.  It's well thought out and not endless and repetitive like most meta games.  I'm routing for this dev team
 to keep pushing.  Good luck and yes I'm keeping the game until then 😁.  Also hoping to come back and give this the 5 stars it is capable of earning.
Needs some refinement, great job so far. Am greatly anticipating the next area update!

Really fun game. Turn based sucks at first but when you get used to it it’s not that bad. Could have a better party system so you can party with friends but it’s still fun to play. Keep up the great work guys.

Game used to be a monster hunter clone and it shows through the looting system. However, the combat and world has been fully overhauled to be more like Dragon Quest, turn based and all. 

Not for people who want action combat. But it’s a chill experience similar to DQ8 and the actual systems closer to DQ10 which never came out in the west.

Though I will say some of the combat is too menu based. I wish there was more interaction like spawning your potion and having to drink it rather than just pressing it then your name, but maybe this could change in the future!

developer_response.body: Thanks! Stuff like drinking potions and active guarding is indeed stuff I'm working on.

reviews.review_description: Awesome game but very buggy. I can’t put anything in my room chest and can’t spawn furniture. Other than that and a few other bugs that need to be worked out I’m enjoying the game.

developer_response.body: Fixed all those bugs! thanks for your review!

reviews.review_description: Has potential but will freeze during combat using items or when capturing, give it a year if it lasts that long to sort its issues out. Worst twenty bucks spent.

developer_response.body: Hi, thanks for reporting the bug on our discord server. This bug is no longer in the game.

reviews.review_description: Its not a bad game i like it am having fun atm but plz make up your own mind ty

After reading some of the reviews and checking out the store pictures/video, I took a chance on the game. It turns out I’m having a blast! Sure there are glitches here and there, but it’s great so far😁

If i could give more than 5 i would . The game play will get better but it EXACTLY what i have been looking for devs are goats for making this
.
game is little buggy but simple and fun with a group
Such A great game. Potential is awsome. Wish more people would  play.. Butbi meet new people every time. Overal im excited for more adventurrs.
I can see this game going places in the future.

When I was thinking of buying this I saw a lot of 1 star reviews saying oh I got stuck at level 5 or something and that’s just because your not playing the game right or you missed a quest or something like that well point is I got it and I love it truly a great game with friends but a little boring alone
Awesome Fun Game. Lots of Nostalgia
The game is really fun there's a few glitches but nothing that ruins the fun of the game or you can't work around I can't wait for new updates.

I really hope this project is still in development. It’s the kind of title I’ve been looking for ever since I bought my first Oculus. Walking around the world gives me strong EverQuest/Ultima Online vibes. With a little more polish, this game could be something exceptional on the Quest.

I confess that I am not a fan of JRPG style combat and I wish the combat system was more of an Action RPG style. But if you create a better tutorial for it I’m sure I will eventually get into it. My only other gripe atmo is that you need to increase the hit box size for grabbing weapons from your back. It can be really difficult to find the sweet spot to grab your sword.

Overall, well done! I’m xcited to see where this game goes.
Def try it

The game offers a truly enjoyable experience overall! The gameplay is engaging, and there’s plenty to appreciate. That said, interacting with NPCs can feel a bit cumbersome, which slightly detracts from the immersion. A life bar option for both friends and enemies would be a welcome addition, adding another layer of strategy and clarity to the gameplay.

Nevertheless, the developers have done an excellent job, and I’m excited to see where future updates will take this already solid game!

reviews.review_title: Best game ever but not there yet
reviews.review_description: Best game ever so much potential just a lack of content I finished this game in like 2 hours basically I do see it has a steam version that has a lot more content and I want there to be more content for the quest version but for now it is very good but not there yet
I have played for about 10 hours and so far it’s been a lot of fun. It still has the under development feel but overall it’s a fun chill game of exploring and leveling your character.

I've been playing this game for 3 days. I absolutely love it. The only issue I have is I play all games sat down. With this game I've had to  bring my boundary floor up so that I can reach the animals after I've beaten them to use the knife etc. It's not a big issue. But a suggestion is probably to add a way so we can crouch while playing. So I'm not always having to look upwards.

developer_response.body: Hi, the game now has a crouch button. If you press down on the right stick you'll be lowered so you can easily carve mobs and grab items. Combined with the seated height offset in the settings the game makes for a pretty nice seated experience now. Thanks for your review!

reviews.review_title: I need my refund extremely unhappy.where
reviews.review_description: No where to go . Map don't work at all ... Nothing to do in here at all . I need my refund

developer_response.body: Hi, if you're lost in the game you can check your quest log or talk to any NPC's that are around. There's quite a lot to do in the game and places to go, so I implore you to give it another shot. Use the minimap & world map in case you're really lost and have no idea where you are. Thanks for your review!

reviews.review_description: Theirs no real tutorial which is confusing considering it gives you what looks like a turn based UI when you do get into combat. The actual combat is alright so far but if you want something with good sword physics theirs better out there

developer_response.body: Hi, the start of the game has had a significant overhaul and the tutorial is much improved now. Hope that helps address your concerns. Thanks for your review!

reviews.review_description: Good game, player base is pretty much dead, and the content not there yet. But seem like a single dev so he doing his best.
This game makes me jork my peenar

This game has a lot of potential. However, it’s extremely buggy. I’m on Quest 3 and here’s the issues I’m dealing with:

1) Grabbing/Equipping weapons and tools is a struggle. 

2) I played with a group of 4 and when going to another area, we wouldn’t be able to see someone in our group, but they could see us? Or they would be glitched in the floor at the start. 

3)1 out of my group of 4 was able to complete the tutorial quest. Either the NPC would say the same dialogue and not let us move on or they would disappear completely.

reviews.review_title: Takes getting used to but so worth it
reviews.review_description: The game took a little bit of getting used to for controls but what game doesn’t. As soon as I got the hang of things it quickly became one of my favorite games so much so that even my brother got it and we started a whole journey together! Definitely worth the buy

reviews.review_title: So much potential but so bad
reviews.review_description: Very glitchy. Couldn't do transactions with NPCs. Got stuck in combat after defeating enemies and had to leave the quest. Didn't receive quest items. If you play seated you can't reach your belt without literally touching the floor and harvesting enemies is near impossible. Requested a refund and was denied. Why is even still available on meta shop, it should be removed.

developer_response.body: Hey, sorry you played when the game was bugged. It's a lot better and more stable now, would love it if you could give it another try. There is a seated mode now btw.

reviews.review_description: Honestly, this game has so many bugs in it that makes me kinda want to turn away from it. Starting with: Weapon grabbing. It’s so hard to grab the weapon from your back. Makes it feel like it isn’t even there. Then, there’s the equipping. Whenever I try to equip something, it just disappears completely. There are a few bugs with the quest as well and so called “dodging” feature. But, if this stuff can be addressed, this game would be great.
Awesome game to play with friends
It is buggy but good concept and fun.
Fire game
It glitch whenever we hit level five and it wouldn't let us return it.

developer_response.body: Hi, the game has been improved a lot ever since your review, it would be really cool if you could give it another shot and see how it goes. The glitch you mentioned should no longer be a problem. Thanks for your review!

reviews.review_description:
Didn't break till level 5 so yeah they wouldn't refund 

FIX YOUR GAME OR GIVE REFUND ,,I,,

developer_response.body: Hi, can you elaborate what you mean by break? It sounds like you might have run into a bug that I was not aware of. The game has seen significant updates since your review, so I implore you to give it another chance. Thanks for your review!

reviews.review_description: Greatgame

reviews.review_title: The game has a nice concept
reviews.review_description: It has a nice concept but it’s very unfinished. With a lot more elbow grease this could become something incredible
It blends together so many fun game elements combined with the idea of playing with other people. Amazing game
It is overall a great game many bigs but otherwise it’s a wonderful game! Me and my friends love it

Lost dialogue boxes once. Transactions didn't work. Got stuck in combat with no enemies had to exit. Can't be played sitting. 

All around just a bad build. Loved the idea but just doesn't work.

developer_response.body: Hey, sorry you played when the game was bugged. It's a lot better and more stable now, would love it if you could give it another try.

reviews.review_title: Nice game once you get the hang of it
reviews.review_description: The game is okay needs work like basic zin bug doesn't say have much currency the player actually has but that's okay good concept I'm actually enjoying it ☺️
So far I am pleased with the game, and I am excited to see it's development in the future as an RPG. Keep up the good hardwork!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the kind words, I'm determined to make QUEST TOGETHER the best RPG on the platform!

reviews.review_description: There aren’t enough RPGs. Quest together is a fun game to explore and make friends. I’m very early into it, but I have friends that enjoy the humor and style of the game.

developer_response.body: Agreed! Glad you and your friends are into it.

reviews.review_description: Awesome game a little bit hard but worth the fighting enjoy
